company: The Narragansett Electric Company d/b/a Rhode Island Energy
source_note: The Narragansett Electric Company d/b/a Rhode Island Energy 2024 Gas Cost Recovery (GCR) filing (Book 1: Pre-Filed Direct Testimony and Attachments), Docket No. 24-29-NG, filed Sept 1, 2024 — the annual reconciliation/recovery of projected gas commodity costs under the Gas Cost Recovery Clause (RIPUC RIE-GAS No. 101) for the period beginning Nov 1, 2024 (177 pp). Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: Rhode Island PUC (ripuc.ri.gov/sites/g/files/xkgbur841/files/2024-09/).

company: The Narragansett Electric Company d/b/a Rhode Island Energy
source_note: Rhode Island PUC Order No. 25247 (January 2025), Docket No. 24-38-GE — on The Narragansett Electric Company d/b/a Rhode Island Energy's tariff advice filing to amend its electric and gas tariffs (Advanced Metering Functionality opt-out charges) (8 pp). Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: Rhode Island PUC (ripuc.ri.gov/sites/g/files/xkgbur841/files/2025-01/).

company: The Narragansett Electric Company d/b/a Rhode Island Energy
source_note: Rhode Island Energy Billing System Evaluation (Redacted), Final Report for RIPUC Docket No. 25-08-GE, 109 pp, prepared by Guidehouse Inc. and Van Reen Accounting LLC for the Rhode Island PUC, issued November 14, 2025. Docket 25-08-GE opened March 2025 after billing discrepancies (delayed net-metering credit application causing customer overpayments); the Commission ordered an independent evaluation of RIE's electric and gas billing and related systems, operational status, accuracy, and effectiveness. Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: Rhode Island PUC (ripuc.ri.gov/sites/g/files/xkgbur841/files/2025-11/RIE-BillingEval_Report_2025-11-14-REDACTED.pdf).
